axioms.name: The Rule of Replacing Ands
axioms.statement: If the words 'and then' belong between beats, you're fucked. Replace them with 'BUT' or 'THEREFORE'.

axioms.name: Revision as Diagnostic
axioms.statement: The technique is a revision diagnostic, not just a planning tool. Hunt for 'ands' during the rewrite.

axioms.name: Single A-Story Focus
axioms.statement: A single well-told A-story outperforms episodes juggling multiple diluted subplots.

axioms.name: Clarity over Complexity
axioms.statement: Just do one thing really right. All you need is clarity.

core_algorithms.name: Three-Word Diagnostic
core_algorithms.purpose: Identify and fix weak episodic transitions between story beats
core_algorithms.pseudocode: FOR each transition(A, B): IF B is consequence of A: RETURN THEREFORE; ELIF B is complication of A: RETURN BUT; ELSE: RETURN AND_THEN (FAIL);

core_algorithms.name: The Shuffle Test
core_algorithms.purpose: Verify structural necessity through reorderability check
core_algorithms.pseudocode: FOR each permutation of beats: IF story_still_works(permutation): RETURN EPISODIC (FAIL); RETURN CAUSAL (PASS);

core_algorithms.name: The Status Quo Test
core_algorithms.purpose: Ensure every scene creates persistent change
core_algorithms.pseudocode: IF world_state_before == world_state_after: RETURN AND_THEN (DELETE); ELSE: RETURN ORGANIC (RETAIN);

core_algorithms.name: Subplot Integration Protocol
core_algorithms.purpose: Ensure all subplots causally interlink with the primary arc
core_algorithms.pseudocode: IF B-plot_resolution CAUSES A-plot_resolution: RETURN VALID; ELSE: RETURN INORGANIC (REJECT);

diagnostic_questions.question: Does Scene B happen BECAUSE of Scene A?
What PREVENTS the character from achieving their goal easily?
Has the character changed because of this scene?
What NEW PROBLEM emerges from the resolution?
If I removed this scene, would anything downstream break?
Are subplots interlinked with the main plot through causation?

core_operations: Apply the Shuffle Test for reorderability
Focus on a single tight A-story
key_constraints: World must change persistently each beat
Protagonist must be active, not passive
Complexity is a weakness; clarity is a strength
